                           +-------------------+
                           |  Handler Group    |
                           |                   |
                           |                   |
                           |  +-------------+  |
                          +o->|  Handler 1  |  |
                          +o  +-------------+  |
                          +o                   |
+------------------+      +o  +-------------+  |
|  Request Router  +------+o->|  Handler 2  |  |
+------------------+      +o  +-------------+  |
                          +o                   |
                          +o  +-------------+  |
                          +o->|  Handler 3  |  |
                           |  +-------------+  |
                           |                   |
                           |                   |
                           +-------------------+
